section_miscategorizations.reason: This entry is too vague and incomplete to function as a meaningful assessment (e.g., it should specify a diagnosis such as lumbar disc herniation with radiculopathy). While the location is appropriate to the Assessment section, the content is miscategorized in the sense that it does not actually convey an assessment/problem and could mislead a reader about the clinical impression.

This is a problem/diagnostic label and belongs in the Assessment section, not in the Plan. The Plan section should contain management actions (medication changes, orders, follow-up, etc.), not just a restatement of the problem.
